name_en: Apricot iconic Baguette small handbag features a flap design with FF magnetic closure. Lined with a zip pocket. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody. Mirror effect silver leather material. Decorated with FF embossed pattern. Palladium metal finish. Size 19cm 0191SM85
